title: Apple Crumble Tart
excerpt: Ingredients 375 ml cake flour 190 ml white or brown sugar 10 ml ground cinnamon 250 ml oats 225 g butter, melted 3 x 385 g tins pie apples, cut into smaller cubes 125 ml castor sugar 30 ml lemon juice 5 ml ground cinnamon Method Mix the cake flour, sugar, 10 ml ground cinnamon, oats and butter …
html:
Ingredients

  • 375 ml cake flour
  • 190 ml white or brown sugar
  • 10 ml ground cinnamon
  • 250 ml oats
  • 225 g butter, melted
  • 3 x 385 g tins pie apples, cut into smaller cubes
  • 125 ml castor sugar
  • 30 ml lemon juice
  • 5 ml ground cinnamon

Method

Mix the cake flour, sugar, 10 ml ground cinnamon, oats and butter lightly.

In another bowl, mix the apples, castor sugar, lemon juice and the 5 ml ground cinnamon and spoon into a greased glass pie dish.

Spoon the crumble mixture evenly over the apples and bake at 180°C for 40 minutes or until the crumble mixture is crisp and golden brown.

Serves 6 with vanilla ice cream.

Easy!
